members.name: items

type.text: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]

members.description: The attachments to render. Set as a JS property (array).

members.name: variant
members.description: Layout: `grid` = visual tiles, `inline` = icon + label chips, `list` = rows.

members.name: hoverCard
members.description: Wrap each item in a hover card that previews its details.

members.name: removable
members.description: Show a remove button per item; clicking it fires a `remove` event.

members.name: showMediaType
members.description: Also show the media type beneath the filename (non-grid variants).

members.name: emptyText
members.description: Text shown when `items` is empty.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Layout: `grid` = visual tiles, `inline` = icon + label chips, `list` = rows.

attributes.name: hover-card
attributes.description: Wrap each item in a hover card that previews its details.

attributes.name: removable
attributes.description: Show a remove button per item; clicking it fires a `remove` event.

attributes.name: show-media-type
attributes.description: Also show the media type beneath the filename (non-grid variants).

members.name: steps
members.description: The reasoning steps. Set as a JS property. Compound sub-parts collapse to this one data model (Route 1).

members.name: messages

type.text: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit")[] }[]

members.description: The full message thread to render, newest last. Each entry carries its role, content, and optional reasoning/tools/attachments/actions. Set as a JS property (`el.messages = [...]`).

members.name: value
members.description: Controlled value of the input. When set, the host owns the input text and must update it on `valuechange`; leave unset for uncontrolled behavior.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text shown in the empty input.

members.name: loading
members.description: When true, shows the loading/streaming state and disables submit (use while awaiting the assistant's reply).

members.name: suggestions
members.description: Starter prompts shown above the input when the thread is empty. Clicking one follows `suggestionMode`. Set as a JS property.

members.name: suggestionMode
members.description: What clicking a suggestion does: `'submit'` (default) sends it immediately as if typed and submitted; `'fill'` just places it in the input.

members.name: proseSize
members.description: Body/prose font scale for rendered markdown (`'xs' | 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg'`). Defaults to `'sm'`.

members.name: codeTheme
members.description: Shiki theme name for syntax-highlighted code blocks (e.g. `'github-dark-dimmed'`).

members.name: codeHighlight
members.description: Enable Shiki syntax highlighting in code blocks. Turn off to render plain `<pre>` blocks (lighter, no highlighter load). Default true.

members.name: chatTitle
members.description: Optional header title shown on the left of the header.

members.name: models

type.text: undefined | { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string }[]

members.description: Optional model list. When set (>1 model) a ModelSwitcher is shown in the header and a `modelchange` event fires on selection.

members.name: currentModel
members.description: The currently selected model id (pairs with `models`).

members.name: context

type.text: undefined | { usedTokens: number; maxTokens: number; inputTokens?: undefined | number; outputTokens?: undefined | number; estimatedCost?: undefined | number }

members.description: Optional context-window token usage. When set, a Context token meter is shown in the header.

members.name: scrollButton
members.description: Show the scroll-to-bottom button inside the scroll area. Default true.

members.name: search
members.description: Show a Search (Globe) button in the input toolbar; fires a `search` event.

members.name: voice
members.description: Show a Voice (Mic) button in the input toolbar; fires a `voice` event.

members.name: slashCommands

type.text: undefined | { id: string; label: string; description?: undefined | string; category?: undefined | string }[]

members.description: Slash commands — when set, typing `/` in the input opens the command palette and fires `slashselect`. Set as a JS property.

members.name: slashActiveIds
members.description: Command ids to highlight as active in the palette.

members.name: slashCompact
members.description: Single-line palette rows.

members.name: codeHighlight

members.description: Code text sizing.

type.text: undefined | { usedTokens: number; maxTokens: number; inputTokens?: undefined | number; outputTokens?: undefined | number; reasoningTokens?: undefined | number; cacheTokens?: undefined | number; estimatedCost?: undefined | number }

members.description: Token-usage data. Set as a JS property.

members.name: groups

type.text: { id: string; userId?: undefined | string; teamId?: undefined | string; name: string; sortOrder: number; createdAt: string }[]

members.description: Pre-bucketed conversation groups (e.g. "Today", "Yesterday"), each with its own conversations. Use this when you want to control the grouping/headers yourself; otherwise pass a flat `conversations` array. Set as a JS property.

members.name: conversations

type.text: { id: string; title: string; groupId?: undefined | string; scope: { type: "document" | "collection"; documentId?: undefined | string; filters?: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }; messageCount: number; lastMessageAt: string; updatedAt: string }[]

members.description: A flat list of conversation summaries; the component buckets them by recency for you. Ignored when `groups` is provided. Set as a JS property.

members.name: activeId
members.description: The id of the currently-open conversation, highlighted in the list.

attributes.name: active-id
attributes.description: The id of the currently-open conversation, highlighted in the list.

members.name: emptyTitle
members.description: Title text. Attribute: `empty-title` (`title` is a global HTML attribute).

members.name: description
members.description: Description text.

attributes.name: empty-title
attributes.description: Title text. Attribute: `empty-title` (`title` is a global HTML attribute).

members.name: barTitle
members.description: The banner label (e.g. "Was this helpful?"). Attribute: `bar-title` (`title` is avoided — it's a global HTML attribute).

attributes.name: bar-title
attributes.description: The banner label (e.g. "Was this helpful?"). Attribute: `bar-title` (`title` is avoided — it's a global HTML attribute).

members.name: multiple
members.description: Allow selecting multiple files (default true).

members.name: accept

members.description: Disable the dropzone — no clicking, no drag-and-drop.

members.name: label
members.description: Default dropzone label (overridable via the default slot).

members.name: alt

members.name: mediaType
members.description: MIME type (default `image/png`).

members.name: variant
members.description: The animation style: `'circular' | 'classic' | 'pulse' | 'pulse-dot' | 'dots' | 'typing' | 'wave' | 'bars' | 'terminal' | 'text-blink' | 'text-shimmer' | 'loading-dots'`. Defaults to `'circular'`.

members.name: size
members.description: Loader size: `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'`. Defaults to `'md'`.

members.description: Label for the text-based variants.

members.name: content

members.description: Text/markdown sizing.

members.name: codeTheme
members.description: Shiki theme for fenced code blocks.

members.name: codeHighlight
members.description: Disable syntax highlighting (no Shiki loads).

attributes.description: Shiki theme for fenced code blocks.

members.name: text
members.description: The reasoning text to display.

members.name: label
members.description: Trigger label.

members.name: open
members.description: Controlled open state — set as a property (`el.open = true`). Omit for uncontrolled (the trigger toggles it).

members.name: streaming
members.description: While true, auto-expands (and re-collapses when it flips false).

members.name: markdown
members.description: Render `text` as markdown.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Controlled open state — set as a property (`el.open = true`). Omit for uncontrolled (the trigger toggles it).

attributes.name: streaming
attributes.description: While true, auto-expands (and re-collapses when it flips false).

events.name: openchange
events.description: Open state changed (via the trigger or streaming auto-open).

members.name: orientation
members.description: Layout axis: `horizontal` (row, default) or `vertical` (column).

events.name: change
events.description: Fired on drag-end / keyboard resize / visibility change. `detail.sizes` = panel sizes in percent.

members.name: size
members.description: Initial main-axis size: `"280px"` (fixed) or `"25%"`/`25` (percent). Omitted → flexible.

members.name: min
members.description: Minimum size during resize (px or %).

members.name: max
members.description: Maximum size during resize (px or %).

members.name: locked
members.description: Fix this panel's size; adjacent dividers become non-draggable.

members.name: hidden
members.description: Hide this panel; its divider is dropped and the rest reflow.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Initial main-axis size: `"280px"` (fixed) or `"25%"`/`25` (percent). Omitted → flexible.

attributes.name: locked
attributes.description: Fix this panel's size; adjacent dividers become non-draggable.

attributes.name: hidden
attributes.description: Hide this panel; its divider is dropped and the rest reflow.

members.name: text
members.description: Text to stream. A string, or an `AsyncIterable<string>` (set as a JS property — async iterables can't be HTML attributes).

members.name: mode
members.description: Reveal animation.

members.name: speed
members.description: Characters/segments per tick.

members.name: as
members.description: Element tag to render as.

members.name: availableAuthors
members.description: Authors to offer as scope filters. Set as a JS property.

members.name: availableTags
members.description: Tags to offer as scope filters. Set as a JS property.

members.name: currentLabel
members.description: The label shown on the trigger for the active scope.

attributes.name: current-label
attributes.description: The label shown on the trigger for the active scope.

events.description: A scope was chosen (`undefined` filters = "All Content").

members.name: skills
members.description: The active skills to badge. Set as a JS property.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL this citation links to (the domain also seeds the default label/favicon).

members.name: label
members.description: Trigger label (defaults to the domain).

members.name: headline
members.description: Hover-card headline. Attribute: `headline` (`title` is avoided — it's a global HTML attribute that reflects in a CE constructor and breaks it).

members.name: description
members.description: Hover-card body text describing the source.

members.name: showFavicon
members.description: Show the source's favicon next to the trigger label.

members.name: showFavicon
members.description: Show favicons on all items (per-item `showFavicon` overrides).

attributes.name: show-favicon
attributes.description: Show favicons on all items (per-item `showFavicon` overrides).

members.name: suggestions
members.description: The suggestions. Strings, or `{ label, value }` when the displayed text and the emitted value differ. Set as a JS property.

members.name: variant
members.description: Chip style: `'outline'` (default), `'ghost'`, or `'default'` (filled).

members.name: size
members.description: Size preset for each chip. Defaults to the pill default (`'lg'`); pass `'sm'` for smaller pills (or `'md'`).

members.name: block
members.description: Full-width left-aligned rows instead of pills.

members.name: highlight
members.description: Substring to highlight within each suggestion.

members.name: as
members.description: Element tag to render as (default `span`).

members.name: duration
members.description: Animation duration in seconds.

members.name: spread
members.description: Gradient spread (5–45).

members.name: text

members.name: tool

type.text: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }

members.description: The tool-call to display. Set as a JS property.

members.name: open
members.description: Start expanded.

members.name: transcribe
members.description: Transcriber the host supplies — records audio, returns the text. This is a **function-valued property** (`el.transcribe = async blob => '...'`) because a value-returning callback can't be modelled as a fire-and-forget event.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disable the mic button (non-interactive).

events.description: Raw audio captured (before transcription) — for hosts that prefer to handle transcription themselves instead of via the `transcribe` property.
